name: Red Velvet Cake#2
recipeInstructions:
(Note: Make the icing for the cake the night before.
Prepare the cake.)
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease and dust three
9-inch cake pans with cocoa.
Cream butter and sugar, add eggs and beat until fluffy.
Make a paste from cocoa and vinegar and add it to the
butter mixture. Sift salt and baking soda with flour.
Add to the mixture alternately with buttermilk. Add vanilla
and red food coloring. Bake at 350 degrees for about 25-30 minutes.
Makes 3 layers.
White Icing for Red Velvet Cake:
1/4 cup Flour
1 cup Sweet Milk
Cook over low heat until smooth paste and let cool.
Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Cream together: 1 stick margarine, 1/2 cup Crisco,
1 cup white sugar, and 1 tsp vanilla.
Beat until fluffy. Add the paste and beat together.
Spread on tops only of cooled cakes. Refrigerate!
